question: Quan nao phu hop cho bua toi lang man o bo song?
answer: Ban co the uu tien cac dia diem co vibe lang man, bo song va view dep nhu The Deck Saigon hoac Hello Saigon trong bo du lieu.

question: Neu muon an toi voi gia dinh thi nen tim gi?
answer: Hay uu tien cac quan thuoc nhom gia_dinh, khong gian am cung, mon an de chia se va co nhieu lua chon cho nhieu nguoi.
